nodes.title: Merger-agentens verifieringskommandon blockeras av policy

properties.status: ✅ Löst — `diff` tillagd i `policy/bash_allowlist.txt` (commit 4dc2c33, körning #21). Workaround i `prompts/merger.md` med `wc -l`/`grep` (commit 9f68e1e, körning #20) kvarstår som fallback.

properties.lösning: Merger bör hoppa över pre-merge-verifiering och istället verifiera post-merge via `git diff HEAD~1..HEAD` i target (som redan fungerar). Alternativt: lägg till `diff`, `md5`, `git hash-object` i target-allowlisten.

Reviewers verifieringskommandon), AGENTS.md äger systemgemensamma protokoll (risk-tiers, handoff-mall, minnesprioritetsordning, anti-patterns). nodes.title: CMV: Contextual Memory Virtualisation — DAG-Based State Management

properties.core: Treats accumulated LLM understanding as version-controlled DAG state with snapshot/branch/trim primitives. Structurally lossless trimming strips mechanical bloat while preserving conversation.
properties.relevance: DAG model enables context sharing between agents. Lossless trimming preserves reasoning while removing tool output bloat.
properties.key_result: Mean 20% token reduction, up to 86%. Mixed tool-use sessions average 39% reduction.
properties.merge_reason: Exact duplicate (similarity=1.0).
